name: Projektengagemang Sweden AB (publ)
summary: Projektengagemang Sweden AB (publ) operates as an engineering and architecture consulting company in Sweden. It operates through three segments: Architecture & Management, Civil Engineering & Infrastructure, and Systems. The Architecture & Management segment offers urban planning, architecture, landscape architecture and interior architecture, as well as project management and consulting on various stages of the building process and societal development and sustainability. The Civil Engineering & Infrastructure segment provides services in the areas of building design; acoustics; geotechnics; energy, environment and sustainability; bridge and civil engineering design; and railways, roads, water treatment, and environmental impact. The Systems segment offers services in the field of HVAC and sanitation design; electrical and telecommunications engineering; and security, fire protection, sprinkler systems, automation, and digitalization. Projektengagemang Sweden AB (publ) was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
